programme.title: Atashinchi
programme.desc: Mikan, Yuzuhiko and their parents navigate their daily lives while confronting various challenges. However, the Tachibana family is known for their clumsiness.

programme.title: Selfie With Bajrangi
programme.desc: Ankush's life changes when he meets a mysterious nine-year-old child named Bajrangi, who is visible to nobody but him alone.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shinchan
programme.desc: Shinchan, a mischievous five-year-old lad, harbours a fascination for older women, cementing his reputation as the naughtiest boy around.

programme.title: Perman
programme.desc: Mitsuo Suwa, a clumsy boy, works as an apprentice for Birdman to become a powerful superhero, Perman, and rescues the victims of crime and disasters.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Zordaar's Chacha annoys everyone when he visits his home. Later, the friends decide to teach him a lesson after he eats all of their food.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Miss katkar punishes popat and asks him to clean the store room due to the chaos caused. However, while cleaning the store room, he gets coated in red paint.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae gets her hair cut for a new look, Shin-chan finds her style to be left wanting and tries to rectify it by shaving a part of her head.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae and her family receive a surprise visit from her parents and her in-laws. However, they are also joined by Kei, Micchi, Yoshirin and Masae.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan and Himawari listens to a story told by Hiroshi about a farmer and a witch and how the witch is defeated with 'laddoos'.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan is requested by Misae to visit the market and purchase some chicken. However, he gets distracted and forgets why he visited the market.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan's family rushes to the supermarket when they learn of available coupons which expire on the same day. However, they are not able to use the coupons.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan declines taking a bath. However, he comes to learn that Nanako will be visiting him soon with a batch of cookies she has prepared.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan engages in an entertaining game on children's day with Hiroshi and Ko-chan. Later, Ko-chan teaches a lesson to a man and his pet dog.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan is left at home by Misae to take care of Shiro and the household whilst she steps out to shop for groceries. However, on returning she finds the house in a mess.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan visits a restaurant where Shinobu is employed and offers a handwritten note in exhange for a burger. As a result, the manager berates Shinobu.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Yoshinaga falls sick whilst Shin-chan awaits his mother to receive him. As a result, Shin-Chan asks Matsuzaka for assistance.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: As the winter season reaches its conclusion, the students at the kindergarten and Yoshinaga celebrate by throwing beans out in the air.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Masao cannot find his crayon, he gets Shin-chan to help him look for it. However, after their investigations, Shin-chan remembers where the crayon is.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan and Masao are requested by Takeshi to take him to Masao's house. However, Shin-chan takes him to his house instead.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan is staying at Yoshinaga's house, he snoops around to find something different. However, Yoshinaga catches him in the act.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After Misae steps outside, Keiko meets with Shin-chan and ends up spending time with him whilst they wait for Misae to return.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Matsuzaka is out on a date with her boyfriend when Shin-chan turns up and interrupts them. As a result, Matsuzaka takes him home.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae tries to realise her dreams of baking cookies with her child and Shin-chan prepares them in the shape of their faces.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Hiroshi takes Misae and Shin-chan to watch a baseball game at the Tokyo Dome. However, they unknowingly sit with fans of the opposing team.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Hiroshi and Misae decide to spend some time playing badminton with Shin-chan, they disagree mid-game and begin to quarrel.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae purchases a lottery ticket after she reads about her horoscope on a magazine. Later, she and her family dream of what they can do with their winnings.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan's family wins a ticket to a samurai theme park called Oedo Land where they can roleplay as Japanese feudal lords.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinchan nohara is a little boy who seems to do everything he can to annoy his parents and teachers (and succeeds wildly), but only means the best. he just tries to have a good time.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae tries a new approach to deal with Shin-chan and correct his behaviour by appreciating his mischief instead of berating him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan is not able to reach home before his curfew, his mother Misae is left annoyed. As a result, she punishes him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: In order to make repairs on the broken pipe, Hiroshi climbs on to the roof. However, Shin-chan's incessant mischief causes him to lose his balance.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan is taken to a music school by Misae so he can learn music. However, the teacher of the institution leaves Misae upset.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae takes her son Shin-chan on a trip to a library to borrow some books. However, Shin-chan causes mischief which troubles the librarian and Misae.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan visits a restaurant where Shinobu is employed and offers a handwritten note in exhange for a burger. As a result, the manager berates Shinobu.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A man disallows Shin-chan and his friends from entering an area from where cherry blossoms can be observed. Consequently, whilst he is away, the kids gain entry.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When it begins to rain torrentially, Misae quickly moves the clothes to the first floor but forgets to close a tap which leads to flooding.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Hiroshi plans to train Shin-chan to become a baseball player. However, on the day of training, he forgets Shin-chan and takes Shiro with him instead.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan takes Shiro for a walk after playing with him. However, Shiro later eats the entirety of the meat Shin-chan's family had put aside for dinner.

programme.title: Shin chan The Legend Called: Dance! Amigo
programme.desc: A sinister atmosphere engulfs Kasukabe after clones of various citizens start appearing out of nowhere. It is up to Shinnosuke and his friends to bring peace back to their city.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: During a school trip, Shin-chan acts mischievously and pesters Yoshinaga. Later, Shin-chan drops Kazama's handkerchief when they visit the washroom.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae is followed by Shin-chan when she is on her way to the bank. Once there, Shin-chan annoys her and keeps her from withdrawing any cash.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae wishes to knit a new sweater for Hiroshi and takes one of his old ones apart. However, with the wool, she ends up knitting a sweater for Shiro.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: The kindergarten organises a three day trip to an island summer school for the students. Once they arrive, the principal takes them for a swim.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan pays a visit to Hitoshi and they play with each other. However, they end up using permanent ink to doodle on each other's faces.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae, Satoshi, Keiko and Shin-chan are spending a great time with each other. Meanwhile, Hiroshi becomes worried about Misae and Shin-chan.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A cream filled bun is kept aside for Narita, who is a guest. However, Shin-chan ends up eating all the cream from the bun.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Hiroshi hears the forecast about an incoming heavy snowfall, he chooses to stay at home. Later, he and Shin-chan use the snow to make a slide.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae and Shin-chan visit a renowned restaurant and try an acclaimed curry prepared by a famous chef. However, they find it distasteful and leave the establishment.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae berates Shin-chan for his misdemeanours. However, later when Shin-chan drinks alcohol from the fridge by mistake, his behaviour changes.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Due to a power cut, the lights go out in Shin-chan's home. As a result, he and his family decide to have their dinner in the candle light.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae irons an expensive suit which she intends to wear at her class reunion the next day. However, Shin-chan accidentally stains it.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Whilst travelling to the post office, Shin-chan gets distracted and forgets why he is going there. As a result, he confounds everyone there.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Masao is troubled by a couple of goons who snatch his video game afterwards. Consequently, Masao starts to cry which causes Shin-chan and his other friends to defend him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: An inter-class softball competition is organised by the principal of the kindergarten but matters complicate when a window is broken by a teacher.

programme.title: Shin chan in the dreaming world
programme.desc: Shin-chan's dreams start to become nightmares in which his family and friends get stuck. Now it is up to him and the Kasukabe Defense Group to escape the nightmare and save the dream.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae comes across her old school uniform, she puts it on. However, the principal of the kindergarten notices this and embarrasses her.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Matsuzaka is out on a date with her boyfriend when Shin-chan turns up and interrupts them. As a result, Matsuzaka takes him home.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan begins a decent march at the Sports Day event but eventually he forgets his steps. Consequently, he ends up confounding the other students as well.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Chakravyu Pari creates a game to trap Baalveer and the other kids. Later, her plan works out successfully as Manav and Meher get trapped in the game.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Chakravyu Pari traps Manav and Meher in a game. Meanwhile, Baal Veer loses all his powers and can only get it back after he finishes the game.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Kids struggle to get out of the magical trap created by Chakravyu Pari. Meanwhile, fairies try to contact Baal Veer but are unable to reach him. Later, Bhayankar sends Chakravyu inside the game.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: The trap game set by Chakravyu Pari gets tougher at every level. Meanwhile, the kids struggle to make their way out of the magical trap.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: As Baal Veer's energy is trapped in the game, Pari Tara vanishes from Parilok. Later, the other fairies try to reach Bal Veer before it is too late.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Manav, Meher and Ballu take help from the magical bird and navigate their way through the game. What new challenges will the game throw at them?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Mehta plans to write an article on children and their parent's tension after vacation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: It is time for Gokuldham Premier League. But, Bhide announces that there will be no GPL as the society has low funds.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundar calls in for two chief guests who will be playing as the captains for the two teams playing in the Gokulam Premier le.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita and Daya's teams get ready for the GPL 2. They start practicing for the match. While Babita's team find.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham Premier League begins, the ground is set ready and teams are ready to compete with each other.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The match begins with the coin toss, Daya's team wins the toss; She chose Feilding. Hence, Mehta enters.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldam Premier League 2 is full of team spirit. Babita and Daya's teams are putting up their best to win the match.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The tension mounts when Babita enters the cricket pitch for her batting turn. Simultaneously, Daya's team dominates the game.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Now Daya's team is doing the bating and Babita's team is Feilding. As the roles are reversed, the match gets a little.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A little break in GPL 2 match, where they conduct a Dandiya dance performance. Later, there's a nail-biting.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The GPL 2 match has come to an end. The last ball is thrown! Did Daya score her wicket to win the match? This is the phase.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The GPL 2 match concluded with Daya's team winning the match and Sodhi winning the title.

programme.title: Crime Patrol
programme.desc: The host presents dramatised re-enactments of real-life crime cases that revolve around harassment, kidnapping and murder.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: The CID team manages to capture Raghu, a criminal, who kidnapped a child. Later, Daya and Abhijeet take him to the interrogation room, where he bangs his head to the wall and kills himself.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After New Year celebrations, when Jethalal arrives at Gada Electronics, he is shocked to find Bagha and Nattu Kaka fast asleep outside the godown in an inebriated state.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bawri's unexpected arrival at the shop throws Jethalal's New Year into disarray. Later, Topo Mobile's freshly appointed area head descends on Gada Electronics, armed with enticing new offers.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal welcomes all the Gokuldham residents to his store to take advantage of the offer from Topo Mobiles and everyone vows to be punctual.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: With renewed positivity, Jethalal heads to his shop, determined to sell 50 mobile phones within two hours. However, the Topo Mobile parcel is yet to arrive.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The delayed arrival of Topo Mobiles throws Gada Electronics into turmoil as customers lose patience. Jethalal scrambles with his staff to handle the chaos and protect the shop's reputation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal shares his worries with the Gokuldham residents as customers wait outside his shop. Later, Inspector Pandey arrives to buy a mobile phone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: With customers constantly arriving for Topo Mobile and time running out, Jethalal aims to sell 50 mobile phones in just two hours.

programme.title: Yashomati Maiyya Ke Nandlala
programme.desc: Yashoda is concerned about the well-being of her child and tries to ward off evil using her own innovative ways. Meanwhile, Krishna leaves everyone surprised with his antics.

programme.title: Super Dancer -- Chapter 5
programme.desc: Super Gurus and Dancers face tough challenges with superstar Bhagyashree as guest. Further, the competition intensifies as finalists draw closer.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Presenting the latest products live on television that can be ordered directly. The product range extends from vacuum cleaners and bath towels to sports equipment.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Presenting the latest products live on television that can be ordered directly. The product range extends from vacuum cleaners and bath towels to sports equipment.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Presenting the latest products live on television that can be ordered directly. The product range extends from vacuum cleaners and bath towels to sports equipment.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Presenting the latest products live on television that can be ordered directly. The product range extends from vacuum cleaners and bath towels to sports equipment.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham members hatch a plan to trace the scammer through the tattoo design. They seek help from the artist who created it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The tattoo artist tricks the scammer into his studio with the help of Tapu Sena and the men of Gokuldham. Inspector Panday sees the footage of Jethalal and Iyer acting as fake police officers.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Members of Gokuldham take Babban to Madhavi for identification. Everyone is shocked when Inspector Pandey arrives at the society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Inspector Panday is furious about Jethelal and Iyer pretending to be police officers. The Gokuldham members try to convince Inspector Panday not to arrest Jethelal and Iyer.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha and Natu Kaka enjoy themselves at work at the expense of Jethalal. The Tapu Sena learn a new type of game on their way back from school.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Tapu Sena agree to lie about going to an extra class. However, Sonu is reluctant and wants to come clean with her parents.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The parents in Gokuldham get worried when the Tapu Sena do not return home on time. The kids spend time having fun.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Tapu Sena lie about studying, making their parents proud that they care so much about education. However, they are exposed when Bhide gets a call from the principal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The parents decide to not tell the Tapu Sena they have learned the truth and continue to treat them nicely.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena get into a big fight with Nandu. Sodhi, Jethalal, Dr Hatthi, Taarak, Bhide, and Popatlal go looking for them in Nandu's area.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Inspector Chalu Pandey, Jethalal, Dr Hatthi, Bhide, Taarak, and Popatlal look for Nandu. A kid in the area helps direct the police to Tapu Sena.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All the members of Gokuldham Society are very excited to finally welcome Daya's mother as they gear up for a celebration.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: On being faced with the possibility of arrest, the residents of Gokuldham ask the police to arrest all of them, leaving the police in awe of their unity.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal gets emotional after seeing Tapu lost in his books. Tapu writes a poem about his mother Daya.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundar tells Daya that their mother is going to be felicitated by a Mumbai organisation. Daya is overjoyed that her mother will be coming to Mumbai and to her home in Gokuldham Society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: An excited Daya distributes sweets to all the members of the society and informs them about her mother's upcoming visit.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everybody is excited about Daya's mother's visit, except Jethalal. A grand preparation gets underway, irritating Jethalal further.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak convinces Jethalal to welcome Daya's mother wholeheartedly and impress her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham Society come together and prepare many exciting things to welcome Daya's mother.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gada family eagerly waits to meet Daya's mother. However, they are disappointed when she misses her train.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: An excited Daya and her family reach the venue to meet her mother. However, Sundar suddenly leaves to look into an urgent matter.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Back home, the remaining members of Gokuldham Society prepare themselves to give a grand welcome to Daya's mother.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya's mother comes to accept the felicitation with her face covered. Jethalal wonders about the reason.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and losing eight years of memory, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings amidst their father's alcoholism.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Virat confronts his father at Sara's party, as Chidiya goes to wish Suraj on his birthday.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Karishma's ego is hurt when she learns that Haseena is also looking for the missing bike. Later, Karishma comes up with a plan to throw Haseena off her game.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to Karishma, the other officers start solving her case to help her. Later, Santosh pays Karishma a visit.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and an eight-year memory loss, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The laundry owner feels bad after Popatlal tells him everything and decides to give him the lottery ticket. However, he is unable to find it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone continues their search for the lottery ticket. They finally meet Manu, a bhelpuri vendor, who has the ticket.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Karishma's ego is hurt when she learns that Haseena is also looking for the missing bike. Later, Karishma comes up with a plan to throw Haseena off her game.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to Karishma, the other officers start solving her case to help her. Later, Santosh pays Karishma a visit.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Kaveri and her husband meet Popatlal, he begins to behave like a madman on purpose. Kaveri's husband then tells Bhide that he has a marriage proposal from his sister.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal meets Kusum and asks her to accept his proposal for marriage. However, Kaveri stops him and says that he should not have lied to her family.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and an eight-year memory loss, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The laundry owner feels bad after Popatlal tells him everything and decides to give him the lottery ticket. However, he is unable to find it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone continues their search for the lottery ticket. They finally meet Manu, a bhelpuri vendor, who has the ticket.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone gathers in Gokuldham after they learn that the ticket might be there. However, when they find the ticket, Popatlal gives it to Manohar.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Popatlal gives back the winning amount to Manohar everyone is proud of him. Later, Bhide and Taarak discuss the events and celebrations for Diwali.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and an eight-year memory loss, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: A compilation of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcases people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.title: The Kapil Sharma Show - Masti Lagataar
programme.desc: Singers Anup Jalota, Talat Aziz and Pankaj Udhas share their thoughts and various artists perform humorous skits to entertain the audience.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Contestants put their minds to solving word puzzles after spinning a giant wheel that determines the monetary value they are playing for.

programme.title: Best of the Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from the Kapil Sharma Show features the renowned comedian Kapil Sharma entertaining the audience with hilarious skits and interactions.

programme.title: Best of the Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from the Kapil Sharma Show features the renowned comedian Kapil Sharma entertaining the audience with hilarious skits and interactions.

programme.title: Indian Idol
programme.desc: Various talented participants from India compete against each other during a singing competition in order to impress the judges and win the title.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: A compilation of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcases people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Some of the best cases of 'Crime Patrol', which investigates how innocent people turn into criminals due to the influence of evil in society.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol - Crime Patrol 48 Hours
programme.desc: A compilation of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcases people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Some of the best cases of 'Crime Patrol', which investigates how innocent people turn into criminals due to the influence of evil in society.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Some of the best cases of 'Crime Patrol', which investigates how innocent people turn into criminals due to the influence of evil in society.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: The host presents some of the best cases from Crime Patrol, which investigates how an ordinary, innocent individual can commit some heinous crimes due to the influence of society.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Sai comes up with a unique plan to get Salim back to Dwarka Mai. After much persuasion, Salim returns to Dwarka Mai albeit a bit reluctantly.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Salim gets immersed in his world as influential people call him to enjoy his gramophone. Later, Sai tries his best to get Salim back on track.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Sai helps Rehana realize that she needs to guide Salim to the right path. In the meantime, Salim is humiliated in Sakori.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Salim misbehaves with Sai and refuses to deliver the order in time. Meanwhile, Kulkarni orders his henchmen to get rid of Salim's gramophone.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Contestants put their minds to solving word puzzles after spinning a giant wheel that determines the monetary value they are playing for.
